site.description: The Devfest (i.e Developers Festival), is a technical conference destined to developers. It's meant for students, professionals, or any curious techie
site.theme: This year, it's game on! Lace up and get ready for a sporty edition!

jumbo.come-back: Devfest Nantes will be back for a sporty edition
jumbo.bring-ecocup: Don't forget your own eco-cup and bag !
jumbo.thanks-gdg-android: Thanks to GDG Nantes Android for developing the mobile app!

tickets.name: Tickets
tickets.description: The ticket sales will take place in two sessions, one on June 6th, and the second on September 5th. Student and job seeker tickets are distributed directly through schools and local employment agencies. Please contact us if your institution has not been reached.

photos.p1: Some pictures of the 2025 DevFest Nantes

citd.title: Code in the Dark
citd.description: Enter Code in the Dark, where coding blindly for 30 minutes becomes a nightmare. One mistake, and everything can go wrong. Who will triumph over the digital chaos? Come and find out... if you dare!

secret.title: Secret Animation
secret.description: Come and discover the secrets of our animation!

map.title: The Venue
map.description: Located in Nantes, the event takes place at the H Arena with more than 3000m² of conference rooms, hands-on labs and networking space.

team.name: Team
team.intro-title: DevFest Nantes is supported by GDG Nantes.
team.intro-p1: The Google Developers Groups (GDGs) are groups of people interested in Google Platforms and Technologies: Android, Chrome, Google Apps, Angular, Cloud... These groups promoting sharing can be found all around the world.
team.intro-p3: The objective of GDG Nantes is to organise events regularly:
team.intro-li1: Google Technology Conferences and others on the Web, Cloud, Mobile, Big Data.
team.intro-li2: Informal theme-based evening sessions around an Aperitif to facilitate meetings of similar minds and thoughts
team.intro-li3: Codelabs to learn concretely and technically about technologies
team.intro-li5: Video retransmissions of major events: US conferences, keynotes
team.intro-p4: To make all this possible, an awesome team of volunteers is working behind the scenes.

footer.no-spam: No spam, only the latest news and updates!
